tables.name: vehicles
tables.instructions: Generate realistic car rental fleet data. vehicle_id like 'VEH-001'. make/model combos like Toyota Camry, Ford Explorer, Honda Civic, BMW 3 Series, Tesla Model 3. category one of: Economy, Compact, SUV, Luxury, Electric. daily_rate between 35.00 and 250.00 depending on category. is_available randomly true/false. license_plate like 'ABC-1234'. location_id references locations table.

tables.name: locations
tables.instructions: Generate rental branch locations at major US airports. location_id like 'LOC-001'. name like 'LAX Airport Branch'. city/state like Los Angeles, CA. airport_code like LAX, JFK, ORD, DFW, MIA, SFO, SEA, ATL. phone like '(310) 555-0142'.

tables.name: customers
tables.instructions: Generate realistic customer profiles. customer_id like 'CUST-001'. Use diverse first/last names. email formatted as firstname.lastname@domain.com with common domains. phone like '(555) 555-0101'. drivers_license like 'DL-A1234567'. member_since between 2018-01-01 and 2024-01-01.

tables.name: reservations
tables.instructions: Generate rental reservations linking customers, vehicles, and locations. reservation_id like 'RES-001'. customer_id references customers, vehicle_id references vehicles, pickup_location_id and dropoff_location_id reference locations. pickup_date between 2024-01-01 and 2025-06-01, dropoff_date 2-14 days after pickup. status one of: confirmed, active, completed, cancelled. total_amount = days * vehicle daily_rate, between 70.00 and 3500.00. created_at a few days before pickup_date.
